nasb.text: The Lord came down on Mount Sinai, to the top of the mountain; and the Lord called Moses to the top of the mountain, and Moses went up.

esv.text: The Lord came down on Mount Sinai, to the top of the mountain. And the Lord called Moses to the top of the mountain, and Moses went up.

cnv.text: 耶和華降臨在西奈山上，就是降臨到山頂上；耶和華呼召摩西上山頂，他就上去了。

ccb.text: 耶和华降临在西奈山顶，召摩西到山顶，摩西就上去了。
